sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n80866" key="penthkosto/pais" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">πεντηκοστό-παις</orth>, <sense id="n80866.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <xr opt="n" TEIform="xr"> <lbl opt="n" TEIform="lbl">f.l. for</lbl> <ref targOrder="U" lang="greek" TEIform="ref">πεντηκονταπ-</ref> </xr> (q. v.).</sense> </entryFree>
